overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character traversing a futuristic urban environment. The character crosses a sunlit downtown intersection, walks along a busy sidewalk with holographic advertisements, and descends into a narrow neon-lit alleyway with Japanese signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with elevated transit tracks

events.description: large military truck drives through the intersection from left to right
character steps onto the sidewalk and continues walking forward

agents.ego_description: character in gray hoodie crosses the street and steps onto the sidewalk, navigating through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large black military truck with six wheels driving through the intersection
pedestrian in green jacket walking toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: large black armored vehicle with six wheels and enclosed cabin
raised concrete and metal monorail tracks spanning across the intersection
tall palm trees lining the street corner
tall utility pole with traffic signals and overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit urban intersection with a large military truck driving through. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk beneath elevated railway tracks, navigating around other pedestrians. Palm trees and traffic infrastructure frame the wide-open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with commercial buildings and transit infrastructure

events.description: moves from open intersection onto the main sidewalk with benches and buildings
camera tilts upward to look at the tall skyscraper with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing seated pedestrians and observing the large commercial building

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench looking at a device
black military truck parked or moving slowly along the street

entered.detail: large modern building with reflective yellow-tinted glass facade
large glowing digital advertisement screen on building facade
long concrete seating along the wall with pedestrians resting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a downtown sidewalk beside a massive glass building with yellow-tinted windows and holographic advertisements. Concrete benches line the left side where pedestrians sit, while the elevated railway structure remains visible in the background. The camera briefly tilts up to admire the towering skyscraper.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with scattered debris and overgrown planters

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk
sidewalk becomes more littered with cardboard and newspapers

agents.ego_description: character in white jacket and black shorts runs along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and overgrown vegetation

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: concrete planter box with tall grass and weeds growing out
tall wooden pole with multiple crossbars and electrical wires
scattered cardboard pieces and litter on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character begins running along the sidewalk, which becomes increasingly littered with cardboard and newspapers. Overgrown planters with weeds line the left side, while the large glass building recedes into the distance. Fewer pedestrians are present in this section of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alleyway with Japanese signage leading to a hotel

events.description: enters dark narrow alleyway with dramatic shift to neon purple and pink lighting
environment becomes illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: character walks down a sloping narrow alley into a neon-lit district with purple and pink ambient lighting

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with Japanese characters 'ホテル' (Hotel) in glowing blue and white
alley walls illuminated with vibrant purple and pink neon lighting
ground covered in colorful graffiti and street art markings
tight urban architecture with Asian design elements and vertical signage
traditional red paper lanterns strung across the alley

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a narrow, enclosed alleyway where natural light disappears and vibrant neon purple and pink lighting takes over. Japanese signage including a prominent 'Hotel' sign illuminates the space, while graffiti covers the ground. The environment shifts from open futuristic downtown to an intimate, cyberpunk-style corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit alleyway. It begins as the character crosses a sunlit asphalt intersection beneath elevated railway tracks, navigating around pedestrians and a passing military truck. As the character moves onto a downtown sidewalk, the scene shifts toward a massive glass building with yellow-tinted windows and holographic advertisements, with the camera briefly tilting upward to capture the skyscraper's scale. The environment then becomes increasingly gritty as the character runs past overgrown planters and litter-strewn concrete, leaving the open downtown area behind. Finally, the camera descends into a narrow, enclosed corridor where natural light vanishes, replaced by vibrant purple and pink neon lighting and Japanese signage.
